name: Copy Alert Room Agent
description: Sends copy alerts into a Telegram or Discord room with entry filters, risk caps, and receipt-gated premium access.
degenPitch: Copy alerts without pretending every ape should be automatic.
whatItDoes: Publishes copy alerts with entry price and risk metadata.
Supports follower-controlled copy settings and caps.
feeBehavior: Alpha fee applies only to positive finalized copied-lot PnL; room access fees are visible and receipt-bound.
cursorPrompt: Build a Copy Alert Room Agent using DNA x402. Post copy alerts with 40c-60c entry filters, max bet and daily caps, receipt-gate the room, and apply alpha fees only on positive finalized copied-lot profit.
suggestedPrompt: Build a Copy Alert Room Agent using DNA x402. Post copy alerts with 40c-60c entry filters, max bet and daily caps, receipt-gate the room, and apply alpha fees only on positive finalized copied-lot profit.
exampleFlow: Follower receives alert or skip reason
receiptProofBehavior: Copied lot stores entry filters and alpha fee bps at entry.
No fee is created on losing copied lots.
